content: Any good hameln wheels that are not limited?
jenkins wheel maybe?
oo maybe
omg that guy
im struggling sighs
This comp seems to be running around now

<@332573289438380032> <@226944773410258946> unfortunately the castor lotan strike comp suffers under this meta, since its incredibly vulnerable to both paralyze and the new entwine, alongside barrier spam
just a heads up X_X
I tried climbing today, and kept running into the Gramona+24+tulu team, or the above here around 1.7k and above
Entwine is not a big deal tho
got the wheel after not thinking of using kath anymore lol
well it looks useful in normal gameplay too
Winkle with it is scary
not sure if I posted the team previously lemme see if I can dig it out
ah yeah here it is
scary team
the corpo barriers protecting her from the snipe to stall
super annoying also
right now I'm using myriam to deal with all of that problem
like corpo/wanda/salvador
yeahh
Oh that team, won against it every time.
but I can't really fit that into the lotan castor comp since I'd lose a critical source of charge
wait how? any advice of what to prioritise/how to deal with it?
I couldn't break through the entwine ;;;

It doesn't pressure you at all with snipes.
Go the greedier combo route with Lotan.
not enough arith to play enough cards
they got too many barriers up though is the issue
like I had to keep spending resources trying to remove the barriers
otherwise I wouldn't be able to snipe
Only 1 stack with Tawil. Remove it with Castor 1 cost or you can just cleave through it with Lotan
And Castor exalt lets you pop 3 extra barriers
they run fouette... they were casting barrier everyturn..
Oh thats funny. Then that actually forces you to snipe Tawil if they equip it
How does it feels to be on the receiving end when you get luck diff?
Kath players mainly just try to luck diff you by pulling their wheel first while waiting for alienus, braindead comp that get spammed so much recently
yeah.. maybe I should've went for that line
I mean they definitely got lucky, like both instances I ran into that team
they had the barrier fouette combo by t1/t2

So against that team, put the nobleman staff on Pandia.
You want to save the Castor 1 cost to pop barriers and you want to save the Lotan 2 cost to aoe down their frontline.
Hameln and GDoll aren't that scary when left alive so you don't care about sniping them.
If they start spamming that T1, you got lucksacked. Can't do much about that.
I see, so prioritise the two capable of stalling and sabotaging rather than taking out the dps?

Check if their dps wins against your team if left alive.
Hameln = probably not
Kathigu-Ra or Alva = going to solo your entire team.

If you go my team you save helot AoE card to break barrier from tawil, you also aim for nobleman staff on pandia, if they try to entwine 4 or 5 stack on pandia you just cleanse with doll then exalt with her to remove all other entwine on your ally, make sure to attack first agrippa to disable her wheel before cleanse
You should bz cleared from hameln stagnation and entwine
They won't have barrier because of ghelot
You do alva pandia combo and kill hameln to discard his wheel
Then kill tawil
tbh I haven't been using your team cuz not only do I lose to paralyse and rng, I lose to being sniped as well ;;;
They only have agrippa and gdoll left but it should be easy now
too often I don't find the snipe wheel and just lose..
or about to snipe, paralysed with no dispel
guy just surrendered the moment tawil died smh
corpo and salvador still alive too
uh
Omg I didn't think of that line pandia removing doll aleimus so good there

You also autowin against any revive teams by Pandia exalting their Celeste.
Can also Pandia exalt someone before you snipe them to deny the revive posse -> exalt.
You can also Pandia exalt your own striker, then dispel the void debuff to combo into plume -> exalt in the same turn.
I like Pandia teams because you can swap between combo or control depending on the matchup.
And imagine getting luck diff by a braindead comp such as kath or helot
What makes you guys change cards at the beginning
I don't get the question
Like your starting cards
what card you prioritized at start instead maybe what you want to say?
ah yeap
it always depend on your team comp
no universal answer
the game's gonna f you over regardless anyway
want to pull 3 cost skill/wheel at beginning so you redraw? get all strikes
wasted lol
I most times go with my starting hand and pray
just remember
the card you put back into the deck
is drawn at the bottom I think
so you wont see that card in that case you need to weight between bricking early but getting the necessary cards to play or just swap your gameplan
which I found weird unlike other game when you shuffle your starting hand it's random if you're going to pull that card next turn
_unless for the whole month I just never drawn the cards I shuffled back until last of current rotation_
yes, barring a death and revive for instance
pandia most fun traphase unit <a:NODDERS:1072052333820772402>
Playing traphase in the jp server!
Hmmm
Now that I look at the available stuff
If you buy the sunfall wheel from the battlepass
You can make a close to full power Helot cleave team

the Helot Tulu Nautila Winkle comp
swap the 5 cost exalt wheel with the 3 cost sunfall wheel
<@332573289438380032> explain how did i lose that lmao
Ramona reunion 1st turn
She either copied her 5 cost card with prepare
Or her copy last skill played card
You kill kath = make her more chance to copy her cards
Kinda annoying she got this skill for several times meanwhile me was just suffering
Agrippa is such a pain in the ass playing against her in Lotan comp
That's why you go alva
Alva is always besto
I do love spam strikes lol
Depending on the situation you use exalt to stagnation her and her strat is kinda fucked up
The cost will be too heavy
Especially shen gdoll try to give 3 arithmetica
She is losing a lot of arithmetica back
The video i shared previously
Look how fucked up his turn was
Because stagnation hurt
So he was forced to end turn and i fucked his setup even more
Also ramona is kind of useless in that team
Any recommended replacement for her i think she comes handy for me you literally gain free arithmeticas and i can spam more lotans 2 cost cards
Go tinct maybe
It will fuck up his setup
+ you can AoE cleanse in case agrippa entwine
I see then i will try with her from now on
Don't go pale descendant btw
Became so trash after update
People still use it idk why
Ig better to go with hand limit +3 card?
After testing multiple time it's kinda bad too for tank
You can only use it for like 2 or 3 turns reasonably before your tank get killed
Can't fully use it
Better get the brain wheel thingy
Exalt = heal 50 hp
You tank so much and they can't properly kill you until death match or a really hard nuke
I see thanks for the tips <:thumbsup:1356086340298473574>
my matchups are way easier now that I know I just need to be luckier lmao
Luck plays a big part but you can still play decently with skills
it does help knowing they aren't gonna do anything so I can take time to Sorel -> Daf ult kath
don't need to set up my wheels
